title: Zander Core
description: Lightweight core library required for Zander’s mod ecosystem
body:
### What is ZanderCore?

ZanderCore is a lightweight core library that powers my mod ecosystem. It doesn't add gameplay content by itself — instead, it unlocks systems naturally as you progress through vanilla Minecraft.



![...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a726c38d8b092ff1ecf3eb0e9721de43a216654.png)


Getting a Crafting Table unlocks the Reinforced Crafting Table

Getting a Smithing Table unlocks the Compression Table

Getting a Book unlocks the Reinforced Recipe Book


### Features

Custom crafting and compression systems
Reinforced Recipe Book with pinnable recipes — pin any recipe to keep it visible while you work
GUI frameworks, networking and capability syncing
Clean internal architecture built to support future mods
Required by all mods in the Reinforced ecosystem.


### Found a bug or have a suggestion? Leave a comment or join the Discord server.

### Support the project on Ko-fi: ko-fi.com/littlezander

 
ZanderCore is planned to be available as a public library for other modders in the future. Stay tuned.
